---
title: "Fun Pages"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4}
::: {.card .h-100}
::: {.card-body .d-flex .flex-column}
#### 🥗 Meal Plan Calculator

Interactive macro planner built from your profile — TDEE, protein targets, carb and protein swaps, and a live macro breakdown.

[Open tool →](meal_planner.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-success .btn-sm .mt-auto}
:::
:::
:::

:::
